framework.name: Three-Tier MLOps Implementation Taxonomy
framework.description: Companies cluster into three MLOps patterns: serverless/cloud-native (Holiday Extras, Ocado, LUSH, Revolut), managed end-to-end platform like DataRobot (Carbon), and in-house ML platforms (Uber/Michelangelo, Netflix/Metaflow, DoorDash). The in-house builders are all tech-native companies; traditional businesses default to cloud-managed.
framework.raw_quote: Cloud-based/Serverless Implementation... End-to-End Implementation with a Managed Platform... In-House ML Platform Implementation

source.title: How These 8 Companies Implement MLOps: In-Depth Guide
